raw.ability details: * Winston's maximum health is increased by 700 and his health and armor are fully restored upon activation, resulting in 1175 total hit points (1325 in role queue): 975 [[health]] (1125 in role queue) and 200 [[armor]]. ** This HP restoration does not count as healing, and cannot be prevented by [[anti-heal]] effects. ** If Winston has more than 200 health (350 in role queue) at the end of the duration, it becomes 200 (350 in role queue). If he has any armor, it is transferred over. (E.g. 700 health, 50 armor becomes 200 health, 50 armor. 550 health, 0 armor becomes 200 health, 0 armor.) * [[File:Ability-winston2.png|sub|link=Winston#Jump Pack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Jump Pack|Jump Pack]]'s cooldown is reset upon activation and when Primal Rage ends and lowered to 2 seconds while Primal Rage is active. * [[File:Ability-winston3.png|sub|link=Winston#Barrier Projector|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Barrier Projector|Barrier Projector]] and [[File:Ability-winston1.png|middle|link=Winston#Tesla Cannon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Tesla Cannon|Tesla Cannon]] cannot be used during Primal Rage. * Melee attacks during Primal Rage have a wide arc and greatly increased knockback. ** The swings alternate direction, starting counter-clockwise. ** The hitbox of the attack lingers slightly longer at the end location of the swing. * [[File:Ability-winston1.png|middle|link=Winston#Tesla Cannon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Tesla Cannon|Tesla Cannon]]'s ammunition is restored when the ultimate ends. * Primal Rage's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

Going uphill does not affect the speed. * Roll form automatically rolls downhill if the player is not counteracting it. * Roll form does not have a critical hitbox (Hammond's body is the "head") and therefore cannot receive [[headshot]]s. * Wrecking Ball comes out of Roll if he is [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]]ed, [[File:Ability-ana2.png|sub|link=Ana#Sleep Dart|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Sleep Dart|slept]], [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|hooked]], or [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]]; or if he tries to shoot or use [[quick melee]]. * Roll can be deactivated, but not activated while [[mobility lock]]ed. These effects also do not interrupt Roll. * Destroys fences and other breakables Wrecking Ball rolls through. * When Wrecking Ball is defeated and respawns, he is automatically in Roll form. The only time he does not spawn in Roll form is when he is first selected.

raw.official description: Create temporary extra health that increase with more nearby enemies. Some of the health can be transferred to allies.
raw.ability details: * Cannot be activated while using melee, casting ''Could not find 'Minefield' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' or ''Could not find 'Piledriver' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. * Adaptive Shields can be reactivated once to redistribute portion of Wrecking Ball's [[overhealth]] evenly to all other allied heroes within the radius. ** Cannot be reactivated while no valid allies are within radius. ** The durations for allies' and Wrecking Ball's overhealth are independent from each other. ** Overhealth is transferred at a rate of 150%. This means Wrecking Ball only loses 1 overhealth for every 1.5 points transferred to ally. ** Each ally can receive up to 75 overhealth. With the aforementioned transfer rate, this costs Wrecking Ball 50 overhealth. ** Wrecking Ball cannot lose more than 300 total overhealth from the transfer, however the amount gained by his allies is still based on his total overhealth. Regardless, hitting this limit requires sharing overhealth to at least 7 allies, making this unachievable in most game modes. * [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] counts as an enemy for creating extra health as well as an ally that health can be transferred to. Constructs, such as [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Turret]], do not.

raw.official description: Slam into the ground below to damage and launch enemies upward.
raw.ability details:
* This ability is bound to Crouch/Toggle Crouch, and replaces Wrecking Ball's ability to crouch on the ground.
* Wrecking Ball must be airborne and at a minimum altitude of 3.5 meters of the surface directly below the center of his model to activate.
** For reference, jumping height is 0.98 meters. As such, jumping does not normally grant enough height to activate the ability, however as the height is measured at the center, it is possible to do it near ledges by aligning the center of the hero over it while jumping.
* Wrecking Ball will be transformed to Roll form immediately upon activation.
** As such, there will be an additional 0.4 seconds (= 0.6s total) delay after hitting ground before he can shoot.
* Affected enemies take damage and are knocked into the air, losing air control for 0.75 seconds.

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Launch a grappling claw to rapidly swing around the area. Enables high speed collisions to damage and knockback enemies.
raw.ability details: * Wrecking Ball automatically enters ''Could not find 'Roll' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' when Grappling Hook is fired and will remain in it while and after grappling. * Wrecking Ball can manually retract the line by holding the Jump button. * If the line is more than 6 meters long and Wrecking Ball moves closer to the claw, the line retracts and stays retracted. * Wrecking Ball respawns with this ability on cooldown. * The duration time limit only activates when fireball is activated. '"`UNIQ--ref-0000007A-QINU`"' ** If the duration ends, Wrecking Ball releases grapple or activates ''Could not find 'Minefield' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', he will remain in Roll mode. ** Any actions and abilities that would transform Wrecking Ball back to default mode from Roll will do so and end Grappling Hook. * Grappling Hook is a [[channeled]] [[movement ability]]; being [[stunned]], [[knocked down]], [[hacked]] or [[mobility lock]]ed, immediately ends the ability, putting it on cooldown. * The hook attaches to a surface, allowing Wrecking Ball to swing around the point of contact. ** Grappling Claw can attach to walls and terrain-like objects, such as Lifeweaver's [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] and [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]]. ** Grappling Claw cannot attach to fences and other breakables, ground surface or ramps, excluding stairs. * Adaptive Shields can be used while grappling without interrupting it. * Wrecking Ball is powered-up while moving at least 15 m/s while grappling or after releasing grapple. This is shown via a fireball effect. ** While powered up, colliding with enemies deals damage and [[knockback]] to enemies. ** Grappling Hooks timer only starts counting once Wrecking Ball hits the fireball speed for the first time during the grapple. ** If Wrecking Ball releases the grapple without reaching the fireball speed, Grappling Hook goes on a shorter 1 second cooldown. *** If Grappling Hook is interrupted by enemy crowd control, it will always go on full cooldown. ** Wrecking Ball will not reach fireball speeds while manually retracting, unless he is already at fireball speeds before retracting. ** Once grapple is released, it fireball lasts approximately 1.5 seconds before Wrecking Ball's movements speed falls below the threshold. This duration can be extended by jumping as deceleration while airborne is lower. ** If Wrecking Ball is slowed by more than 25%, this puts him below the threshold and his swings cannot power-up at all. * Grappling Claw's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

raw.ability details: * Manual healing stacks with passive healing, for a total of 75 health per second. * Resource starts regenerating at a rate of 12.5% per second after 2 seconds of not being used. * Targeting another ally with the beam will immediately move the passive stream to them. * Passive healing has no range restriction once it has been placed, however it will time out if the target is not in direct line of sight of Wuyang for too long. * Beam can be briefly activated without consuming energy to change the passive healing target. This can be done also while completely out of energy. * Restorative Stream is a [[channeled]] ability; use of fire is limited, and being [[stunned]] or [[knocked down]], including their subsidiary effects, interrupts the cast. ** Wuyang cannot use his primary fire while channeling Restorative Stream. Other abilities are unaffected, and ''Could not find 'Tidal Blast' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' can still be used to target a player, which will stop channeling Restorative Stream upon activation. ** Being stunned or knocked down stops channeling Restorative Stream, but will not cause the passive healing to be retracted. Being hacked does not stop the ability when it is already being channeled, but prevents from new channeling instances. * Abilities that make the target untargetable by allies (see [[#Tidal Blast]] for list) instantly break the active healing, however the passive healing will remain on them unless moved or expired.

raw.ability details: * A confirmation prompt is given upon activation, allowing Wuyang to choose whether to target an ally (Primary Fire) or himself (Secondary Fire). Pressing ultimate ability key again cancels the targeting. ** When used on Wuyang, the ultimate has an interruptible startup delay and the cast recovery is increased, but otherwise he gains the same benefits from the ultimate. * The target ally (or Wuyang) is granted [[overhealth]] and [[movement speed]] while the explosion winds up. Upon explosion, the overhealth and speed boost are removed and the ally is healed. * The target is ''not'' immune to negative effects while carrying Tidal Blast. * Once Tidal Blast is successfully placed on a hero, the explosion can only be interrupted by eliminating the target. * Enemies hit by the explosion are [[knocked down]] and take damage. * Tidal Blast persists on the target if they enter an invulnerability state where they are untargetable by allies, however the target must be out of this state when the wind up ends or the explosion will not happen. ** Following interactions may prevent the explosion: Anran during [[File:Ability Dancing Blaze.png|sub|link=Anran#Dancing Blaze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Anran#Dancing Blaze|Dancing Blaze]], D.Va after entering her Mech with [[File:Ability-dva6.png|sub|link=D.Va#Call Mech|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Call Mech|Call Mech]], Doomfist targeting [[File:Ability Doomfist Meteor Strike.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Meteor Strike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Meteor Strike|Meteor Strike]], Echo transforming in/out of [[File:DUPLICATE.png|sub|link=Echo#Duplicate|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Duplicate|Duplicate]], Mei during [[File:Ability-mei2.png|sub|link=Mei#Cryo-Freeze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Cryo-Freeze|Cryo-Freeze]], Sombra while teleporting with [[File:Ability Sombra Translocator.png|sub|link=Sombra#Translocator|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Translocator|Translocator]], Tracer during [[File:Ability-tracer3.png|sub|link=Tracer#Recall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Recall|Recall]], Venture during [[File:Burrow_icon.png|sub|link=Venture#Burrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Venture#Burrow|Burrow]], Kiriko while teleporting with [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Swift Step|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Swift Step|Swift Step]] and Moira during [[File:Ability Moira Fade.png|sub|link=Moira#Fade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Fade|Fade]]. ** Following abilities will not prevent the explosion: Zarya's [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle/Projected Barrier]], Reaper's [[File:Ability-reaper2.png|sub|link=Reaper#Wraith Form|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reaper#Wraith Form|Wraith Form]], Kiriko's [[File:Protection_Suzu_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Protection Suzu|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Protection Suzu|Protection Suzu]], Zenyatta's [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]] * Tidal Blast cannot be placed on D.Va's exploding Mech, however if D.Va activates [[File:Ability-dva4.png|sub|link=D.Va#Self-Destruct|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Self-Destruct|Self-Destruct]] while carrying Tidal Blast, it will follow the exploding Mech. * Can be targeted through [[barrier]]s, but the explosion does not go through them. * The effect from Tidal Blast can stack, which means that Wuyang and a friendly Echo can place it on one player. * Benefits from [[Damage modification|damage buffs]], however they must be affecting the target of Tidal Blast rather than Wuyang. * Wuyang can start gaining ultimate charge 1.5 seconds after the explosion. * Speed buff stacks with other move speed buffs, up to the +75% global movement speed limit.

The charge cooldown of the next charge is set depending on which ability was used. * Zarya gains 0.2% Energy per damage blocked by the barrier, or 1% Energy per 5 damage blocked. ** Single Particle Barrier can generate up to 45 energy before it breaks. * Another Particle Barrier cannot be cast while Zarya is affected by her own Personal Barrier, Projected Barrier from another Zarya or enemy Domina's [[File:ULT Panopticon.png|sub|link=Domina#Panopticon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Domina#Panopticon|Panopticon]]. * While the barrier is up, Zarya is immune to all damage and most negative [[status effect]]s, even if the attack pierces [[barrier]]s. ** Removes and prevents slowed, hacked, hindered, anti-heal and damage over time effects. ** Prevents stunned, knocked down, knocked back, asleep, hooked and frozen but does not remove them. *** Does not protect Zarya from knockbacks from attacks that can pierce barriers, like [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]] or [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]]. ** Prevents Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat3.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Steel Trap|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Steel Trap|Steel Trap]] from activating but does not remove its effects. ** Does not unstick stuck projectiles, like [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]], [[File:Jagged_Blade_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Jagged Blade|Jagged Blade]] or [[File:Tracking Shot.png|sub|link=Sierra#Tracking Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Tracking Shot|Tracking Shot]]. ** Does not prevent or remove ''Could not find 'Graviton Surge' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] or [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]]. * Even if the barrier is destroyed, it will protect Zarya from the attack that broke it. ** Reinhardt's [[File:Ability-reinhardt5.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Earthshatter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Earthshatter|Earthshatter]] can hit Zarya with the shockwave and stun her if the close range critical hit broke the barrier. ** Vendetta's [[File:Sundering Blade.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Sundering Blade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Sundering Blade|Sundering Blade]] completely ignores Zarya defense, deals damage to Zarya and her barrier at the same time.

raw.ability details: * All [[movement abilities]] are disabled within the effect of Graviton Surge. * The projectile is blocked by [[barrier]]s, activating upon contact, but the area of effect pierces barriers. * The projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it impacts, but the area is unaffected. * The impact damage can be amplified, but periodic damage cannot. * Impact damage is affected by [[armor]], but the periodic damage completely ignores armor's damage reduction. * Both impact damage and periodic damage are affected by other forms of [[damage reduction]]. * Periodic damage starts 0.47 seconds after the projectile lands. * Graviton Surge cannot be removed or prevented by abilities that grant [[invincible]] or [[phased out]] status effect. * Targets can be pulled out of Graviton Surge by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. * Targets can be lifted out of Graviton Surge by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]], provided it can be activated. * Reinhardt is unaffected by Graviton Surge while casting [[File:Ability-reinhardt5.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Earthshatter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Earthshatter|Earthshatter]].

raw.ability details:
* Orb of Discord remains on the target indefinitely, while they stay within line of sight of Zenyatta.
** One Orb of Discord can be active at a time.
** The orb is removed if the line of sight to the target is obstructed for more than 1.5 seconds.
** [[Barrier]]s prevent applying Orb of Discord but do not break line of sight to a target that is already affected by it.
* When Orb of Discord is removed from a target, they cannot be targeted by it again for 6 seconds.
** A UI element with a timer will be displayed while aiming toward a target the orb cannot be applied to.

raw.official description: Become invulnerable, move faster, and heal nearby allies.
raw.heal: 400 health per second
raw.ability details: * Zenyatta becomes [[invulnerable]], preventing damage and making him immune to [[slow]]s, [[stun]]s and [[knockdown]]s. ** Additionally, activating Transcendence removes [[damage over time]], [[anti-heal]] and [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]] from Zenyatta. ** Zenyatta can still be affected by other negative [[status effect]]s, such as knockbacks and gravity effects. * Zenyatta cannot shoot or use abilities during Transcendence. * [[File:Ability-zenyatta1.png|middle|link=Zenyatta#Orb of Destruction|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Orb of Destruction|Orb of Destruction]]'s ammunition is restored upon activation. * Transcendence does not work through walls or barriers. If allies are in the AoE but behind walls, they will not be healed. * Zenyatta cannot capture objectives while casting Transcendence. He can still contest them, however. * Transcendence's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

heal.raw: 400 health per second
